context.modo_position: Utility-scale BESS in Poland could reach 8-9 GW by 2030.
grounding_notes: Poland's battery energy storage buildout outlook

headline_signal.title: UC84 Grid Act enforces 30-month permit window
headline_signal.implication: Developers with grid agreements face urgency.

signals.pattern: Signal set indicates immediate GTM timing for targeted outreach.

assets.curation_logic: Prompts selected to balance near-term outreach and market-structure understanding.

emails.subject: Poland signal worth discussing
emails.body: We have been tracking a fresh Poland signal and built a concise view on what it means for your route-to-market assumptions. If useful, I can share the short note and tailored Ko prompt set.

linkedin_post.body: Modo's latest market read points to a sharper entry window in Poland. The key is matching signals to the right outreach sequence.

newsletter_blurb.headline: Poland market entry watch
newsletter_blurb.body: A new signal cluster in Poland changed outreach priorities this week. We mapped the top profiles and attached Ko-ready prompts.

video_topic.thesis: The first 30 days in Poland are won by signal speed and grounded outreach.
video_topic.suggested_expert: Market analyst with BESS GTM experience
